name: Bhavik Kumar
bio_html: I'm a PhD fellow in Theoretical and Mathematical Physics at QMATH, University of Copenhagen, supervised by Prof. Daniel Malz. My research sits at the intersection of quantum information theory, quantum simulation, and many-body physics — I develop scalable protocols for learning, characterizing, and calibrating quantum many-body systems using experimentally accessible measurements. I completed an integrated BS–MS in physics at IISER Mohali, and was a visiting PhD student at St John's College and the Cavendish Laboratory, University of Cambridge in 2025.
